'''âl-y-z-p''' ('''kalayzepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruby|ruby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruby|ruby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-y-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kalayzepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilayzepoko|thilayzepoko]] || [[word:jilayzepoko|jilayzepoko]] || [[word:shilayzepoko|shilayzepoko]] || [[word:kilayzepoko|kilayzepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
